title: streblus celebensis
intro: Streblus celebensis, also known as the Celebese breadfruit, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. It is a tree native to Sulawesi, Indonesia, with various medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Streblus celebensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for consumption, as well as being used in folk medicine for various health conditions.
